scenarioName: Render method drill-down under each observed body node

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Render method drill-down under each observed body node
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The ASCII execution sketch should include a 'method drill-down' branch for executable body nodes, displaying specific method facts for each call. Body nodes without method calls should show 'method detail missing', and all facts should precisely match `feature-execution.contract.v1.json`.
steps.observedResult: No report or live-call receipt was observed, therefore no rendering or data could be verified against the acceptance criteria.
